name: Capability Contract and Real Output Harness
objective: Define a reusable contract that bounds future tool input, output, scopes, permissions, cost, failures, rollback, and acceptance evidence.
non_goals: No CLI installation, host control, provider call, filesystem write, or execution.
inputs: Future customer-approved input, output, read_scope, write_scope, network, dependencies, permissions, cost, failure_conditions, rollback, and acceptance_checks.
outputs: Future machine-reviewable contract and real-output acceptance plan.
excluded_patterns: Terminal, CI, data-cleaning, dependency, refactor, API, migration, and release workflows need their own bounded behavior evidence.
known_gaps: The proposal is locked and only describes a future harness; it does not execute or validate a tool.
